title: seseli elatum subsp. osseum
intro: Seseli elatum subsp. osseum, also known as osseous seseli, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the carrot family (Apiaceae) that is native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Seseli elatum subsp. osseum include relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its potential to reduce pain and inflammation. Seseli elatum subsp. osseum can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs in traditional herbal remedies.
